english_query: I hope that he may; but I rather fear, old teacher, that the other way will turn out to be true. My thought is that in hitting you he is simply trying to hit the thing that holds up the land. But in what way does he say that you make the young bad?
ugf_response: He brings a strange thing to say against me, which at first hearing makes people surprised: he says that I am a writer of stories about gods, and that I make new gods and say the old ones are not there; this is the reason for his saying I did wrong.

english_query: Also, the word start comes from being first. But in god there is no before and after, as the old church teacher says. So we should not use the word start when we speak of god.
ugf_response: Even though the word start seems to come from being first, it does not mean being first, but where something comes from. For what a word means, and why it was given that name, are not the same thing, as said before.

english_query: It seems that the life parts of animals that do not think stand on their own. For man is in the same group as other animals; and, as we just showed, the life part of man stands on its own. So the life parts of other animals stand on their own.
ugf_response: Although man is in the same group as other animals, he is of a different kind. The change in kind comes from the change in what makes it what it is; and not every change in what makes it what it is means a change in group.

english_query: Do not worry about him, but tell me what you mean by saying that the art of speaking is like a thing that looks real but is not of how people run things.
ugf_response: I will try then to explain my idea of the art of speaking, and if I am wrong, my friend the young man will show me. Can we say that bodies and souls are real?

english_query: The young friend will not be mad, for he is very kind. But tell me old teacher, please, is this, after all, not the true thing?
ugf_response: You old number man, you like new ideas, and now you think that I have a bag full of them, and can easily pull one out to beat the last one. But you do not see that in truth none of these ideas come from me; they all come from the one who talks with me. I only know just enough to pull them from the able to think well thoughts of another, and to take them in a right way. And now I will say nothing myself, but will try to get something from our young friend.

english_query: And what would you say of the way we take in things, like seeing and hearing, or any other way of taking in? Is there any stopping in the act of seeing and hearing?
ugf_response: Certainly not, if all things are moving.

english_query: I wish that you would give me a same kind of answer for the letter that is like the first part of the word sea.
ugf_response: But how can any one, old teacher, tell the parts of a part? I can only say that the letter that is like the first part of the word sea is a letter that makes a sound like air going out; the letter that is like the first part of the word big and most other letters are not sounds from the mouth or just noise. So letters are best said to have no clear meaning; for even the seven sounds that are the clearest, are just sounds and have no meaning at all.

english_query: Also, all living things are led to their end by the care of god, as was said before. But other living things are not said to be chosen by god for a special future. So men are not either.
ugf_response: Living things that cannot think well cannot reach that end which is more than what man is made to do. So they cannot be said in the right way to be chosen for that special future; even though the word is used in a not clear way for any other end.

english_query: It seems that god does not stay the same. Because whatever changes itself is in some way able to change. But, as the great old church teacher says, the maker moves itself not by time and not by place. So god is in some way able to change.
ugf_response: The great old church teacher speaks here like the old man who said the first mover moves itself; calling every doing a moving, even as the acts of thinking, and wanting, and caring, are called moving. So because god thinks and cares for itself, in that way they said that god moves itself, not, however, as moving and changing belong to a thing that can be changed, as we now speak of changing and moving.

english_query: And to whom do we go with the ones who do wrong and do not stop?
ugf_response: To the ones who decide right and wrong, you mean.

english_query: It seems that in made things there is not always a mark of the three-in-one. Because we can find the thing by its marks. But we cannot find the three-in-one from made things, as was said before. So there is no mark of the three-in-one in made things.
ugf_response: The mark points to how we give names to the parts: in this way we can know the three-in-one of the god parts from made things, as we have said.

english_query: Also, the way, the kind and the order are good themselves. So if what being good really is made of way, kind and order, then each way would need its own way, kind and order. The same would happen with each kind and each order always.
ugf_response: The way, the kind and the order are said good and said things, not because they are things that are there all by themselves, but because through them other things become things and become good. So they do not need other things to be good: we say them good not because something else made them that way, but because they make other things good. For one we do not say white a thing by itself; we say it that because by white another thing can be white.

english_query: Also, whatever we say of god and of made things, belongs to god in a better way than to made things. But words for numbers show a real thing in made things; so much more so in god.
ugf_response: The idea of many things, which shows a real thing in made things, is a kind of how much there is, and cannot be used when speaking of god: different from a many-thing idea that adds only not-being-cut into parts to those of which it is said. Such a kind of many-thing idea can be used for god.

english_query: Also, the old teacher says that 'the way things are would miss its end' if we could not know things that have no body, 'because it would make what is easy to know not known at all.' But in the way things are nothing is for no reason. So we can know things that have no body.
ugf_response: This saying of the old teacher is wrong in many ways. First, if we do not know things that stand alone, it does not mean no mind knows them; for they know themselves, and they know each other. Second, to be known by us is not the end of things that stand alone: while only that is for no reason, which misses its end. So it does not follow that things that have no body are for no reason, even if we do not know them at all.

english_query: No, not to a man able to think well, as the talk shows: do you think that all our worry should go to making life last as long as it can, and to learning those things we do to keep us safe from bad things always; like that thing of talking well that saves men in places where laws are said, and which you tell me to learn?
ugf_response: Yes, for real, and very good talk too.

english_query: Also, power is the main idea of how things work. But the power of god is what god really is, because there is no extra in god; and for what god really is there is no main idea. So there is no power in god.
ugf_response: In things that are made, power is the main idea not only of doing but also of end. So in god the thought of power is kept because it is the main idea of an end; but not as the main idea of doing, because doing is what god really is; maybe after our way of thinking, because what god really is, which already has all good parts of made things, can be thought of as a doing or as a power; also it can be thought of as a thing that has a kind, and as a kind. So the thought of power is kept in god as long as it is the main idea of an end.

english_query: Also, in things made by one who wants to make them, and whose want is not caused by anything, there can be no cause given except by the want of him who wants. But the want of God is the cause of all things, as was shown before. If, then, there is no cause of His want, we cannot look in any things of the world for any cause, except the want of God alone. So all knowing would be for nothing, since knowing looks to give causes to what happens. This seems wrong, and so we must give some cause to the want of God.
ugf_response: Since God wants what happens to come from certain causes, to keep order in the world, it is not wrong to look for causes that are after the want of God. It would be wrong to do so, if such were seen as first, and not as resting on the want of God. In this way the great old church teacher says: 'Men who think they know much have chosen to put chance things to other causes, being not able at all to see the cause that is shown above all others, the want of God.'

english_query: It looks like being good comes from a gift from god, as the writer of the letters says. Now a gift from god is not moved from one to another, for that would be usual; but is put in by god only. So children would not have been born being good.
ugf_response: Some say that children would have been born, not with the good that comes from a gift from god, which is the main idea of pay, but with first being good. But the start of first being good, which gave being good to the first person when he was made, is that the mind was put under god, and that putting under god comes from a gift from god, as we said before. So we must think that if children were born with first being good, they would also have been born with a gift from god; we have said before that the first person was made with a gift from god. This gift would not have been usual, for it would not have been moved by the first part; but would have been given to a person as soon as he got a mind. In the same way the mind, which is not sent from the parent, is given by god as soon as the body can get it. From this the answer to the third point is clear.

english_query: And does being good to the sky powers, which has been said to be the way of caring for the sky powers, help them or make them better? Would you say that when you do a good thing for the sky powers you make any of them better?
ugf_response: No, no; that was certainly not what I meant.

english_query: It seems god cannot do better than he does. For whatever god does, he does in the most able to think well and most good way. But a thing is so much the better done as it is more able to think well and more good done. So god cannot do anything better than he does.
ugf_response: When we say god can make a thing better than he makes it, if 'better' means the thing itself, this is true. For he can always make something else better than each single thing: and he can make the same thing in one way better than it is, and in another way not. But if 'better' means how he does it, then god cannot do anything better than he does, because he cannot do it from more able to think well and more good. But if it means how the thing is, he can make something better; because he can give to things made by him a better way of being in some ways, though not in what a thing really is.

english_query: Well, I think not.
ugf_response: Then if big power is right as you say, will the hot one have big power in a city?

english_query: It looks like one part of the soul does not come from another. For if many things start at the same time, one does not come from another. But all parts of the soul are made at the same time as the soul. So one part does not come from another.
ugf_response: As the power of the soul comes from what it really is, not by changing form, but by the way things just are, and is there at the same time as the soul, so it is with one part when we look at how it is to another.

english_query: But if you stay away from these words, the old teacher, how will you ever talk about why something is right or not at all?
ugf_response: I can not, because that is who I am. It would be different if I were a real person who is very good at talking about thoughts, and I wish such a person were here! He would tell the bright young one and me not to use these words, but he would also not keep the things that are not right in the bright young one and me that I have seen. Yet, because we are not very able to think well, may I try to say what someone knows is? I think the try may be good.

english_query: Also, being like means we can put things side by side. But we cannot put side by side things that are in different big groups. So there can be no being like. We do not say sweet is like white. But no made thing is in the same big group as god: because god is not in any big group. So no made thing is like god.
ugf_response: God is not set against made things as if he were in a different big group, but as being above every big group, and as the start of all big groups.

english_query: You are making fun, old teacher; your help for him has been very big.
ugf_response: Thank you, friend; and I hope that you saw the well known teacher of speaking tell us to be serious, as the words, 'The person is the way to know all things,' were a big thing; and he said we were wrong to use a young one to talk, and said that the fear of the young one was made to hurt his point; he also said that we made fun of him.

english_query: It seems that we can only will what we understand. So if the will has to move to understand, that move of the will must come after a move of the thought, and that move of the thought must come after another move of the will, and so on. That can not happen. So the will does not move the thought.
ugf_response: We do not have to go on all the time, we can stop at the thought as the first thing. Every move of the will needs a understand first, but a understand does not need a will first. The be the one who lead help and understand is a thought idea that is above our thought, the old teacher says this, and so we see we do not have to go on all the time.

english_query: To be sure, old teacher.
ugf_response: And what is doing what the gods want, and what is not doing what the gods want?

english_query: Then clearly, old teacher, you would say that you did not even know if the big leader was a happy man?
ugf_response: And I would speak the true words; for I do not know how he is with learning and doing right.

english_query: Also, the great old church teacher says the mind does not end because it can know what is true. But what is true does not end and has no start. So the part of the soul and the sky spirit that knows things does not end and also has no start.
ugf_response: Sky spirits and able to think well souls do not end because they have a way of being that lets them know what is true. But they did not have this way of being from the very first; it was given to them when God wanted it. So it is not true that sky spirits were there from the very first.

english_query: Also, the things in the sky are better than things on the ground. But the human body is the best; because it has the best shape, which is the part that can think. So it should be made from sky things, not ground things.
ugf_response: Even though sky things are better in themselves than ground things, they are not good for what the thinking part does. The thinking part gets truth through the senses, and the parts that sense cannot be made of sky things which do not change. Also, it is not true that some of the sky stuff goes into the body, as some say who think the mind joins to the body by light. First, they are wrong that light is a body. Second, it cannot happen that something from the sky stuff joins with the ground parts, because sky things do not change; so they do not go into bodies made of many parts, except by their power.

english_query: It looks like when we see good and better, we also see bad and worse. Good and better are thought about by looking at what is the best. So bad and worse are thought about by looking at some most bad thing.
ugf_response: The power of any thing grows with what the thing is. And as a shape is a best thing, not full takes away a best thing. So each shape, best thing, and good thing get more strong the closer they get to the best end; but not full and bad get more strong the farther they get from that end. So we do not call a thing bad and worse because it is near the most bad, just like we call a thing good and better because it is near the most good.

english_query: Very good strong man who tells others what to do; but will he answer our questions? for I want to hear from him what is the way of his work, and what it is which he says he teaches; he may, as you suggest, wait to show it at some other time.
ugf_response: There is nothing like asking him old teacher; and to answer questions is a part of his show, for he was saying only just now, that any one in my house might put any question to him, and that he would answer.

english_query: To be sure old teacher; and I very much like your way of seeing how good something looks by how it makes us feel and how it helps us.
ugf_response: And can we see how bad or not good something is by the same way, using how it hurts us and how it is bad?

english_query: Also, just as our eyes are for things we can see, our mind is for things we can know. But our eyes can see all body things, both the high ones that do not break and the low ones that break. So our mind can know all things we can know, even the high ones that have no body.
ugf_response: Our eyes know body things, high or low, in the same way, by the thing hitting our eye. But we do not know body things and things without body in the same way. We know body things by taking away the body part, which we cannot do for things without body, because there are no pictures in our mind for things without body.

english_query: Let us try to say what it means to know.
ugf_response: And why should that be not afraid to show what one is?

english_query: Also, it is said about the Second One that he holds all things by the word of his power. From this, a man who taught long ago says the Spirit is the word of the Second One. So being the word is not just for the Second One.
ugf_response: When it is said the Second One holds all things by the word of his power, the word is used in a picture way to mean what comes from the Word. So a note says the word here means an order. This is because by the power of the Word, things stay in being, just as by that power things are made. The man who taught long ago speaks in a wide and picture way when he calls the Spirit the word. He means maybe that anything that shows a person can be called his word. So in that way the Spirit can be called the word of the Second One, because he shows the Second One.

english_query: Good: but I must still ask what is this caring for the gods which is called being good to the gods?
ugf_response: It is such, old teacher, as the people who work for others show to the people who tell them what to do.

english_query: It looks like the soul is the same kind of thing as a bright spirit from god. Because each thing is set to its right end by its kind, which gives it a pull toward that end. But the end of the soul is the same as that of a bright spirit from god, which is lasting good. So they are the same kind of thing.
ugf_response: This talk comes from the near and real end. Lasting good is the last and not-of-real end.

english_query: Gold is a thing that is good to have.
ugf_response: But if gold were easy to find like rocks, we would not want it much. If water were hard to find, we would want it much. The way we feel about a thing changes because of how often we see it. So we cannot say if gold is really good to have in itself. We do not say either yes or no.

english_query: But does he do what he wants if he does what is bad? Why do you not answer?
ugf_response: Well, I think not.
